infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Guidera uses the camera to scan receipts, translate signs, and capture travel moments
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Guidera uses your location to show nearby destinations, provide safety alerts, and navigate to places
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Guidera uses your location in the background to send safety alerts and geofencing notifications about high-risk or low-risk areas near you
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Guidera needs access to your photos to upload profile pictures, share travel photos, and scan receipts
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Guidera uses the microphone for voice input with the AI travel assistant
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Guidera uses speech recognition to understand your voice commands and have conversations with the AI travel assistant
infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: Guidera can add your trip events and flight schedules to your calendar
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Use Face ID to securely unlock Guidera and protect your account
